query:
-- 1. Inserir preço de sistema R$ 5,00 para o novo responsável PACSML Ltda (id=90001) na unidade PACSML
INSERT INTO billing_system_unit_prices (financial_responsible_id, unit_id, price_per_report, starts_at, created_by)
VALUES (90001, 210001, 5.00, '2026-05-14 10:52:25', 1);

-- 2. Atualizar os eventos pending_system_price para ok
UPDATE billing_visit_events
SET 
  system_amount_due = 5.00,
  system_price_applied = 5.00,
  pricing_status = 'ok'
WHERE 
  unit_id = 210001 
  AND pricing_status = 'pending_system_price';

-- 3. Verificar resultado final
SELECT 
  bve.id,
  usr.name as doctor_name,
  fr.legal_name as responsible_name,
  bve.system_amount_due,
  bve.doctor_amount_due,
  bve.pricing_status,
  bve.signed_at
FROM billing_visit_events bve
JOIN users usr ON usr.id = bve.doctor_user_id
LEFT JOIN financial_responsibles fr ON fr.id = bve.financial_responsible_id
WHERE bve.unit_id = 210001 AND bve.doctor_user_id = 1
ORDER BY bve.signed_at DESC
LIMIT 8;

-- 2. Atualizar os eventos pending_system_price para ok
UPDATE billing_visit_events
SET 
  system_amount_due = 5.00,
  system_price_applied = 5.00,
  pricing_status = 'ok'
WHERE 
  unit_id = 210001 
  AND pricing_status = 'pending_system_price';

-- 3. Verificar resultado final
SELECT 
  bve.id,
  usr.name as doctor_name,
  fr.legal_name as responsible_name,
  bve.system_amount_due,
  bve.doctor_amount_due,
  bve.pricing_status,
  bve.signed_at
FROM billing_visit_events bve
JOIN users usr ON usr.id = bve.doctor_user_id
LEFT JOIN financial_responsibles fr ON fr.id = bve.financial_responsible_id
WHERE bve.unit_id = 210001 AND bve.doctor_user_id = 1

LIMIT 8;
